race.description: Moet & Chandon Queen Of The Turf Stakes (G1)
race.comment: LADY SHENANDOAH (2) fresh mare on the scene with a sense of timing fourth-up. Warmed up late when fourth over 1500m in the G1 George Ryder Stakes at Rosehill. Record here is impressive and will eat up the brutal tempo. The one to beat. TREASURETHE MOMENT (3) distance specialist who beat inferior opposition with a commanding win over 1600m in the G2 Sunline Stakes at Caulfield. Ran third in the Cox Plate last year and expected to figure prominently with her regular rider aboard. PRIDE OF JENNI (1) failed in this race in 2023 and drops in grade and trip today. Went under narrowly in a gruelling contest when second over 2000m in the G1 Australian Cup at Flemington. Won't get things her own way here and prefer the place. IDLE FLYER (8) nice mare ready to take on this grade. Gave an indication of what she's capable of with sharp victory as fav in the G2 Emancipation over 1500m at Rosehill. Has more to offer and not without top-three claims. LEICA LUCY (6) has minor place prospects.
